---
name: "Feature"
about: "Use this template for creating a new feature"
type: "Feature"
---

# Description
<!-- The big picture of a feature you want to add to your project. It has multiple functionalities. It can do multiple
things. -->

<!--Big picture / high-level. -->

<!--Represents a large chunk of functionality that delivers value to the user. -->

<!--Usually too big to finish in one sitting or sprint. -->

<!--Gets broken down into smaller stories. -->

<!-- Example Feature: -->
<!--“Add User Authentication System” -->
<!--This includes everything needed for sign-up, login, password reset, and account management. -->

<!--OR -->

<!-- Example: Add a user authentication system with login, signup, and password reset -->

# Requirements
<!-- What must this feature do? Write the essential capabilities here. -->

<!-- Think of this as the checklist of MUST-HAVE functions for the feature to be considered complete. -->

<!-- Example Requirements: -->
<!-- - Users can create accounts -->
<!-- - Users can log in with email + password -->
<!-- - Users can reset their password via email -->
---

# Tech Refinements
<!-- Technical notes on how the feature might be built. These are hints for the devs. -->

<!-- Mention tools, frameworks, libraries, or design decisions. -->

<!-- Example Tech Refinements: -->
<!-- - Use OAuth2 for secure login -->
<!-- - Store passwords with bcrypt hashing -->
<!-- - Use PostgreSQL database to store user credentials -->
---

# Dependency Links
<!-- What other features or stories does this depend on? -->

<!-- Think about things that must exist FIRST before this feature can be built. -->

<!-- Example Dependencies: -->
<!-- - Story #15: Backend API for authentication -->
<!-- - Story #16: Frontend login form -->
<!-- - External dependency: Email service for password reset -->
---

# Notes
<!-- Any additional details that don’t fit elsewhere. -->

<!-- Use this for reminders, questions, or considerations. -->

<!-- Example Notes: -->
<!-- - Coordinate with frontend team for form design -->
<!-- - Ensure mobile responsiveness -->
<!-- - Might require security review before release -->
